narrative:
Middleburg Heights-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,243 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.1 percentage points.
